Similarly, students who have applied for a scholarship and accommodation, but only intended to apply for the scholarship may delete the request for accommodation service using the special “Delete the accommodation service application” button, available by accessing the benefits application from their personal Online Helpdesk page.

of Ministerial Decree 1320/2022 provides that students enrolled at the same time in more than one course are allowed to obtain and keep the scholarship, increased by 2, 0 \% , if they meet and maintain the merit requirements, set out in the decree itself, for the entire duration of the courses. The increase is not due if the student loses eligibility for the grant. Nor is it paid if the student loses eligibility for the increase itself. Students enrolling in the filter semester may NOT indicate a related course as their second course and must follow the provisions of art. 9(3) of this notice.

Excluded: students do not meet the requirements of the notice of competition or have not rectified material errors present in the application via complaint.

91.title: If students have declared “I am interested”, or “I am interested with the Erasmus Option” but it turns out that they have NOT been allocated accommodation, they are included in the single scrolling rankings (paragraph 3 of this article) and compete for the amount of the scholarship including the monetised value of the unused accommodation service (art. 5(1.3) point a), should they be scholarship winners and submit the declaration of paid accommodation;
If students have declared “I am interested with the Renato Einaudi Option” they must follow the provisions set out in paragraph 5 of this article.

92.title: the allocation or non-allocation of accommodation. For students who have declared “I am interested” or “I am interested with the Erasmus Month” Option, the allocation of accommodation can take place at course type or University level. Initially, the spots remaining after the winners’ acceptance are redistributed to eligible students of the same course level. Any spots still left over are redistributed within the University and, finally, if there are additional seats to be allocated, a final distribution is made based on the course location only.
